questions.question: What is the unit of energy?
questions.explanation: Energy can be expressed in various units, but Joules are a commonly used and accepted unit.

questions.question: What is the relationship between energy and work?
questions.explanation: Work can be considered as a transfer of energy from one object to another.

notes.title: Types of Energy
notes.content: There are several types of energy, including kinetic energy (the energy of motion), potential energy (stored energy due to position or configuration), thermal energy (energy associated with temperature), electrical energy, chemical energy, nuclear energy, and radiant energy.

notes.title: Work-Energy Theorem
notes.content: The work-energy theorem states that the net work done on an object is equal to its change in kinetic energy. This theorem helps in understanding how energy is transferred from one form to another.

facts.fact: The law of conservation of energy states that energy cannot be created or destroyed, only converted from one form to another.
The concept of potential energy is crucial in understanding various phenomena in the natural world, including the falling objects, springs, and electric charges.
